dict.string: HealMeNow uses the camera to photograph medical documents (lab reports, prescriptions) so they can be added to your personal health record. Photos go only to your own self-hosted server.
HealMeNow can require Face ID to open the app, keeping your health record private if someone else uses this phone.

HealMeNow can read steps, heart rate, HRV, sleep, weight, blood pressure, oxygen saturation and body temperature from Apple Health — only if you turn the sync on — and stores them in your own self-hosted health record. Nothing is shared with anyone else.
HealMeNow connects to your own Medplum health-record server on your local network.
HealMeNow lets you pick existing photos of medical documents to add to your personal health record on your own server.
